CustomField.formula: IF( TEXT(Order_Domain__c) =='B2C', IF( Booking_Date__c < DATE( 2021, 08, 01), 'W001',IF( AND(Booking_Date__c >= DATE( 2021, 08, 01),Booking_Date__c < DATE( 2023, 02, 03)), 'W002', IF(Booking_Date__c >= DATE( 2023, 02, 03), 'W003', '') ) ) , IF( BM_Booking_Date__c < DATE( 2021, 08, 01), 'W001',IF( AND(BM_Booking_Date__c >= DATE( 2021, 08, 01),BM_Booking_Date__c < DATE( 2023, 02, 03)), 'W002', IF(BM_Booking_Date__c >= DATE( 2023, 02, 03), 'W003', '') ) ) )
CustomField.label: Warranty Type
